text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Early summer is here, and bit by bit, I'm hitting my stride as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!
choice_data_list: You got this! Keep it up!
You got this! Keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm just getting started! Lemme show you what I can really do!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: No change in my time, huh... Guess I hit the gas a little too late.
choice_data_list: You want to do one more lap?
You want to do one more lap?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Can I?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ah, but... Hmmm, I think I'll stop here.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's almost the end of the day, and I've still got stuff to do... Yeah,
let's continue tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'll go put the equipment back. Catch you later, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She takes off with a smile, yet I can't quite shake a nagging feeling...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's just me, but I'm pretty sure she wants to continue running.
Just what could be more important?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hm? I thought you would've gone back by now.
choice_data_list: I wanted to finish something up.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: M'kay, guess I'll clean your area later then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if on autopilot, she begins cleaning my office like she's done it a
million times.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Ah, we're almost out of printer paper! I better swing by the
supplies room before heading back.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh, so many dust bunnies! I'm coming to get ya! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, the office is always clean, and the supplies
never run out...
choice_data_list:
Have you been maintaining the room all this
time?!

Have you been maintaining the room all this
time?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't help it—clutter gets under my skin! I wanna keep our shared
space spick and span, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not that I don't appreciate it, but I'd rather she use this time to hit
the track instead.
choice_data_list: Sorry! I'll take care of cleaning from now on!
Sorry! I'll take care of cleaning from now on!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You mean... by yourself? Without any help?
choice_data_list:
Yeah, I don't want to take away from your
running time.

Yeah, I don't want to take away from your
running time.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You mean... by yourself? Without any help?
choice_data_list:
Yeah, I don't want to take away from your
running time.

Yeah, I don't want to take away from your
running time.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Really? Well... let's see what you've got, then! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's just cleaning. How hard can it be?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the dustcloth is over there! And if you're looking for the broom
and dustpan, they're over in the corner!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: That goes on this shelf! It's best to keep them all neatly together!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You can find spares for those over there. If you run out, just ask the
supplies guy for more!
choice_data_list: Th-this is a lot harder than I thought!
Th-this is a lot harder than I thought!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you got this, you got this! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Ines Fujin's guidance, I somehow manage to finish cleaning.
But...
choice_data_list:
I ended up relying on you for pretty much
everything...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Impressed? This is the result of years spent elbow-deep in
chores! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I feel bad making you do all the grunt work, so let's do it
together from now on. After all, this is our special hangout!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Geez, turn that frown upside down! C'mon, I made some tea, so let's
take a break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to prove that she could rely on me, but in the end, she's the
one saving me like a knight in shining armor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to prove that she could rely on me, but in the end, she's the
one saving me like a knight in shining armor.
